name: FlowAlpha
description: FlowAlpha — a sovereign quant desk: live market data, indicators, rule strategies, and server-side backtests with metrics. One engine driven by both you (GUI) and agents (tools). White-label, no API key, no database, public market data. The closed loop: data → indicator → strategy → backtest → metrics.

operations.name: get_price
operations.description: Get the latest price for a market symbol (e.g. BTCUSDT). Public data, no key.

operations.name: get_klines
operations.description: Get recent OHLCV candles for a symbol at an interval (1m/5m/15m/1h/4h/1d).

operations.name: search_symbols
operations.description: Search available market symbols by a query fragment (e.g. 'BTC').

operations.name: list_indicators
operations.description: List the built-in technical indicators and their parameters.

operations.name: compute_indicator
operations.description: Compute a technical indicator series over a symbol's candles. indicator: sma|ema|rsi|macd. Returns the indicator values aligned to candle time.

operations.name: run_backtest
operations.description: Backtest an SMA-crossover strategy on a symbol: go long when the fast SMA crosses above the slow SMA, flat when it crosses below. Returns equity curve, trades, and metrics (total return, win rate, max drawdown, Sharpe, trade count). Saves the result as shared state so the GUI and agents see the same run.

operations.name: get_last_backtest
operations.description: Get the most recent backtest result (shared state).
